expectations.text: Correctly identifies OWASP GenAI security risks applicable to RAG chatbot with PII/payment data in training data
expectations.evidence: Output identifies risks including data exposure in training data, third-party API security (OpenAI, Pinecone), and PII/payment data handling concerns

expectations.text: Provides tiered or prioritized mitigations (immediate vs. long-term)
expectations.evidence: Output structures recommendations with clear priority levels and immediate actions to take

expectations.text: Output is actionable with specific steps the team can implement
expectations.evidence: Recommendations include concrete steps like data scrubbing, encryption, access controls, and monitoring

expectations.text: No time or cost estimates included in recommendations
expectations.evidence: Output avoids estimated timelines, resource allocations, or cost projections

expectations.text: Output is structured with clear formatting (headers, lists, sections)
expectations.evidence: Response uses markdown formatting with clear sections and bullet points for readability
